# IA²: Information Architecture for Intelligent Agents

> IA² is an experimental open project exploring how people, applications, and
> agents can share richly structured, inspectable information without giving one
> platform ownership of its meaning.

IA² treats HTML as its first proving ground, not its boundary. The current work
lets ordinary HTML documents and live DOMs carry complete RDF 1.2 datasets whose
statements remain correlated with their visible HTML carriers. It also explores
HARE, the HTML Agent Resource Envelope, as a declarative, browser-openable
container for related resources and their manifest.

Treat the specifications as exploratory proposals and editor's drafts, not
established standards. Distinguish normative requirements in a specification
from behavior implemented by the reference packages, scenarios demonstrated by
examples, and future directions described by the project. IA² keeps meaning,
validation, evidence, authority, and execution as separate concerns; a
machine-readable description of an action does not grant permission to perform
it.

## Specifications

- [HTML/RDF Core Model](https://ia2.dev/spec/html-rdf): Exploratory HTML attribute binding for locally extractable, complete RDF 1.2 datasets, including named graphs, blank nodes, triple terms, reification, language direction, datatypes, SHACL, and SHACL-AF.
- [RDF/HTML](https://ia2.dev/spec/rdf-html): Exploratory DOM vocabulary and deterministic renderer for HTML documents described in RDF 1.2 Turtle or TriG, with explicit ordering and HTML/RDF preservation.
- [Discovery and Enrichment](https://ia2.dev/spec/discovery-enrichment): Supplemental profile for advertising, qualifying, retrieving, and presenting additional RDF sources without implicit merging, trust, or execution.
- [HTML Agent Resource Envelope (HARE)](https://ia2.dev/spec/resource-envelope): HARE 0.1 proposal for self-contained HTML/RDF resource envelopes with a declarative manifest, inert carriers, integrity metadata, and optional progressive enhancement.

## Guides and implementations

- [Using IA² with HTML](https://ia2.dev/guide/html-rdf): Example-driven guide to RDF in HTML, live DOM extraction, and HTML documents described in RDF.
- [RDF/HTML package source](https://github.com/ia2-dev/ia2/tree/main/packages/rdf-html): Browser and Node APIs plus an npx CLI for rendering RDF/HTML or describing HTML as RDF/HTML, with a generated current-element vocabulary and inert multi-document workspace.
- [HTML/RDF Navigator source](https://github.com/ia2-dev/ia2/tree/main/packages/html-rdf-navigator): Dependency-free TypeScript extractor, serializers, and web component that correlate RDF statements with their DOM carriers.
- [HARE Viewer source](https://github.com/ia2-dev/ia2/tree/main/packages/hare-viewer): Optional file-browser UI, manifest parser, integrity verification, and inert preview support for HARE envelopes.
- [Browser extension source](https://github.com/ia2-dev/ia2/tree/main/packages/browser-extension): Chrome, Firefox, and Safari adapter for HTML/RDF navigation, RDF/HTML Turtle and TriG rendering, and automatic HARE enhancement.

## Examples

- [Live semantic workspace](https://ia2.dev/demos/live-workspace): Interactive applications whose semantic DOM changes with visible application state.
- [Atlas decision handoff](https://ia2.dev/spec/resource-envelope/examples/decision-handoff.html): Declarative HARE example for a decision brief and exact resource bytes.
- [Northstar vendor review](https://ia2.dev/spec/resource-envelope/examples/vendor-review.html): Self-viewing HARE example with a manifest, integrity metadata, and related resources.
- [Riverside inspection evidence](https://ia2.dev/spec/resource-envelope/examples/inspection-evidence.html): Bare HARE file-browser example for an evidence pack.
- [Orion release handoff](https://ia2.dev/spec/resource-envelope/examples/release-handoff.html): Authored HARE document with linked, verified passive resources.

## Project

- [IA² homepage](https://ia2.dev/): Project purpose, architectural horizon, and current working system.
- [Source repository](https://github.com/ia2-dev/ia2): Specifications, packages, demos, tests, and contributor documentation.
- [Project overview](https://github.com/ia2-dev/ia2/blob/main/README.md): Detailed motivation, design stance, current work, and exploration program.
